input: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. It did so three times in quick succession, then trotted off into the meadow. The dog watched, uninterested.

expected.idealSummary: A fox jumps over a dog three times and leaves; the dog remains uninterested.

input: חברת סטארט-אפ ישראלית בשם SparkFlow גייסה השבוע 10 מיליון דולר בסבב Seed. החברה מפתחת פלטפורמת AI לעורכי דין. ההשקעה הובלה על ידי Bessemer Venture Partners.

expected.idealSummary: SparkFlow גייסה 10 מיליון דולר לפלטפורמת AI לעורכי דין, בהובלת Bessemer.

input: Global shipping costs fell 12% in Q1 2026 as the Red Sea shipping lanes reopened and container supply stabilised. Analysts expect a further 5% drop by mid-year.

expected.idealSummary: Shipping costs fell 12% in Q1 2026 with more drops expected mid-year.

input: The CEO announced a company-wide four-day work week starting May 1. Pay remains unchanged. HR will publish implementation details next Monday.

expected.idealSummary: Company adopts four-day work week May 1 with unchanged pay; HR details Monday.

input: פסק דין חדש של בית המשפט העליון קבע כי חיוב בכרטיס אשראי לא מורשה יש להחזיר תוך 14 יום. הבנקים יצטרכו לעדכן נהלים.

expected.idealSummary: עליון: חיוב לא מורשה בכרטיס אשראי חוזר תוך 14 יום; בנקים יעדכנו נהלים.

input: OpenAI released gpt-4.1 on March 14, 2026. It features a 1M context window, native multimodal input, and a 40% cost reduction over gpt-4o.

expected.idealSummary: OpenAI launched gpt-4.1 with 1M context, multimodal input, and 40% cheaper than gpt-4o.

input: Tel Aviv was ranked third globally for startup ecosystem density in 2026, trailing only San Francisco and New York. Top sectors: AI, fintech, cybersecurity.

expected.idealSummary: Tel Aviv ranked #3 startup ecosystem in 2026, strong in AI/fintech/cybersecurity.

input: The European Union's AI Act phase 2 took effect April 1, 2026. High-risk AI systems must now carry a CE mark and undergo conformity assessments.

expected.idealSummary: EU AI Act phase 2 (April 1, 2026): high-risk AI needs CE mark and conformity assessment.

input: A new study from Technion shows LLM hallucination rates drop by 30% when grounded with retrieval-augmented generation over domain corpora. RAG adoption is accelerating.

expected.idealSummary: Technion: RAG cuts LLM hallucinations 30%; adoption accelerating.

input: TechCrunch reports Stripe launched a new 'Agent Commerce' API in April 2026, letting autonomous agents transact on behalf of users with scoped spending limits and audit trails.

expected.idealSummary: Stripe's April 2026 Agent Commerce API lets AI agents transact with limits + audit trails.

input: The Israeli Supreme Court ruled today that employers must pay overtime for on-call hours exceeding 8 per week. Ruling applies retroactively.

expected.idealSummary: Israeli Supreme Court: overtime pay required for on-call >8h/week, retroactive.

input: Anthropic announced Claude Sonnet 4.5 on April 10, 2026. Benchmarks show 15% improvement on SWE-bench and 25% on GPQA. Pricing unchanged.

expected.idealSummary: Anthropic's Claude Sonnet 4.5 improves SWE-bench 15%, GPQA 25%, same price.

input: Apple unveiled the Vision Pro 2 on April 8, 2026. Half the weight, 4x eye-tracking resolution, and full native AI workspace integration with Claude and OpenAI.

expected.idealSummary: Apple Vision Pro 2 (Apr 8, 2026): half weight, 4x eye tracking, native Claude+OpenAI.

input: Supabase released pgvector 0.8 with HNSW indexing support and 3x faster approximate nearest neighbor search over IVFFLAT.

expected.idealSummary: pgvector 0.8: HNSW indexing, 3x faster ANN than IVFFLAT.

input: בית המשפט לענייני משפחה פסק כי מזונות ילדים יקבעו בהתאם להכנסה משותפת של שני ההורים, לא רק של אב. שינוי תקדימי.

expected.idealSummary: תקדים: מזונות ילדים לפי הכנסת שני ההורים, לא רק האב.

input: Vercel shipped Edge Functions v3 with 50ms cold start, global replication, and native streaming. Deploys are 40% faster.

expected.idealSummary: Vercel Edge Functions v3: 50ms cold starts, 40% faster deploys.

input: Meta open-sourced Llama 4 on March 1, 2026. Three sizes: 8B, 70B, 405B. Trained on 30T tokens with native tool use.

expected.idealSummary: Meta open-sourced Llama 4 (Mar 2026): 8B/70B/405B, native tool use, 30T tokens.

input: Figma announced AI-native Figma Make on April 3, 2026. Describe a site in natural language; Figma outputs Tailwind + React code.

expected.idealSummary: Figma Make (Apr 2026) turns prompts into Tailwind+React code.

input: Tesla's Q1 2026 earnings: revenue up 8%, delivery volume flat, margin compressed. FSD v13 launching public beta in Europe.

expected.idealSummary: Tesla Q1 2026: +8% revenue, flat deliveries, tighter margin; FSD v13 beta in Europe.

input: The Bank of Israel raised the base interest rate by 0.25% to 4.75% on April 7, 2026, citing persistent inflation in housing.

expected.idealSummary: Bank of Israel raised rate 0.25% to 4.75% on Apr 7 2026, due to housing inflation.
